summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Foundation Phase APIs and new engines. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend landing page and footer component working correctly with dynamic contact info from API.

minor.issue: Syntax error - non-default argument follows default argument in remove_role_from_user method

issues: Chart components showing width/height warnings in console - not critical but should be addressed

identity_engine.py had a syntax error that was fixed (parameter order issue)
Footer component correctly fetches and displays contact info from /api/public/contact-info API
Admin dashboard does not include footer by design - footer is only on public pages

seed_data_creation: Educational stages seeded via POST /api/academic/stages/seed-defaults (KG, PRIMARY, INTERMEDIATE, SECONDARY)
